posts.text:
🚨HELP,  TRAFFICO , TERRORISMO - what’s the story here?

Recent satellite imagery has revealed a series of large, hand-made signs in Los Angeles displaying words like "HELP," "LAPD," "FBI," "TRAFFICO," and "TERRORISMO," sparking widespread speculation online. Located near train tracks and shipping containers, these signs have puzzled the public regarding their creator and purpose. An individual known as "@LAguy310"  took it upon himself to investigate.
